---
title: "Marco Sorbona – R Portfolio"
subtitle: "Data Science with R Specialization (Duke University) & Public Health Projects"
author: "Marco Sorbona, PhD"
date: "March 2026"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: false
---

## About

Welcome to my R portfolio. This page showcases projects completed during the **Data Science with R Specialization** at Duke University.

---

## 📊 Featured Projects

### 1. Chicago Taxi Analysis
**Course:** Data Visualisation and Transformation  
**Description:** Exploratory analysis of Chicago taxi trips (2022). Investigated tipping behaviour by trip distance, taxi company, and time of day.  
**Skills:** `ggplot2`, `dplyr`, `tidyr`, `Quarto`  

[🔗 View Report](https://marcoSorbona.github.io/data-visualisation-transformation-project/)  
[📂 Repository](https://github.com/MarcoSorbona/data-visualisation-transformation-project)

---

### 2. (Future Projects)

---

## 🛠️ Tools & Packages

| Category | Packages |
|----------|----------|
| **Data wrangling** | `tidyverse`, `dplyr`, `tidyr` |
| **Visualisation** | `ggplot2`, `plotly`, `leaflet`, `DT` |
| **Reporting** | `Quarto`, `flexdashboard` |
| **Statistics** | `effectsize`, `broom` |

---

## 📬 Contact

**Marco Sorbona, PhD**  
[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/marco-sorbona-phd) | [GitHub](https://github.com/MarcoSorbona)

---

## 📄 License

**Code:** MIT  
**Data:** Open Government Licence v3.0 (for UK data); original sources for other datasets.
